title: vitex barorum
intro: Vitex barorum, commonly known as the Beech Tree of the Gods, is a plant species native to the tropical forests of Africa. This plant is valued for its rich source of bioactive compounds, which have been traditionally used to support women's health, particularly during menstrual issues and menopause. The health benefits of Vitex barorum include alleviating symptoms of premenstrual syndrome (PMS), regulating menstrual cycles, and providing relief from anxiety and stress. The therapeutic actions of the plant are attributed to its bioactive constituents, including iridoid glycosides, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which exhibit anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and hormonal balancing properties.
